contracts.project: TMPA Nevada to Shelby Tap 138kV Transmission Line
contracts.notes: Geotechnical, design, and civil engineering services to support the construction of the TMPA Shelby to Nevada Tap 138kV Transmission Line, including optional contingency for additional services.

contracts.project: Restaurant Drive-Through at 5200 North Garland Avenue
contracts.limits: 0.784 acres
contracts.notes: Planning and engineering services for a restaurant drive-through development (Salad and Go) including detail plan, site layout, landscaping, and building elevations.

contracts.project: Water & Wastewater Mains Replacement
contracts.limits: 895 linear feet of water line and 5,720 linear feet of wastewater main
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services to replace existing water line and wastewater main in three locations: alleys between Ancilla/Bethany/Concord Drives and Plano Road.

contracts.project: Water and Wastewater Line Replacement - Alley between Ancilla Drive and Bethany Drive, Alley between Bethany Drive and Concord Drive, Plano Road
contracts.limits: 895 linear feet of water line and 5,720 linear feet of wastewater main
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services to replace approximately 895 linear feet of existing water line and 5,720 linear feet of existing wastewater main in three locations in Garland.

contracts.project: Lead and Copper Rule Compliance Phase II
contracts.notes: Professional services for lead and copper rule compliance Phase II to continue system assessment and field studies throughout the water distribution system to confirm various pipe types.

contracts.project: Rowlett Creek 48" Interceptor Main Rehabilitation Phase IX
contracts.limits: approximately 2,765 feet of 48" interceptor line
contracts.notes: Wastewater interceptor relining services for Phase IX of the Rowlett Creek 48" Wastewater Interceptor Rehabilitation Project, relining approximately 2,765 feet of 48" interceptor line from north of President George Bush Turnpike towards Ben Davis Road along Rowlett Creek.

contracts.project: 2023 Alley Pavement & Wastewater Improvement Design
contracts.limits: 19 alleys and 2,000 linear feet of sewer line
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for design of alley pavement reconstruction and sewer line replacement across 19 alleys with 2,000 linear feet of sewer improvements.

contracts.project: GP&L Pruitt 138kV Switch Station Terminal Addition
contracts.notes: Engineering and design services for the addition of a new terminal at the TMPA Pruitt 138kV Switch Station, including project management, construction phase field engineering, and engineering completion and close-out services.

contracts.project: 2019 Bond Program - Additional Program Management Services
contracts.limits: Through December 2025
contracts.notes: Program management and staff augmentation services for the 2019 Bond Program to support completion of public improvement projects through December 2025.

contracts.project: Pavement Condition Index Survey for the Garland Street Network
contracts.notes: Pavement Condition Index services to assess the condition of all city streets and alleys in accordance with recognized industry standards and provide data for street improvement project programming.

contracts.project: TMPA Gibbons Creek Switch Phase II Civil Grading Improvement
contracts.notes: Engineering services addendum for civil grading improvements at Gibbons Creek Switch Phase II project. This is an addendum to the original Professional Services Agreement.

contracts.project: Woodbury, Ticonderoga & Quail Paving Water and Wastewater Improvements
contracts.limits: approximately 3,085 linear feet of 8" water and wastewater main replacement
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for designing 8-inch water and wastewater mains replacement on E. Woodbury Drive, Ticonderoga Drive, and Quail Drive, including full concrete street pavement replacement.

contracts.project: GP&L Shiloh Road to McCree 138kV Transmission Line Engineering and Surveying Addendum No. 1
contracts.notes: Change Order #1 for engineering services including additional studies, design services, design changes, and revised engineering plans and bid packages for the GP&L Shiloh Road to McCree 138kV Transmission Line to accelerate increased power flow capacity to meet ERCOT required upgrades.

contracts.project: Comprehensive Plan Update
contracts.limits: 20 months
contracts.notes: Comprehensive plan update providing a fiscally-based guide for future growth and redevelopment, including land use analysis, neighborhood context, mobility and connectivity strategies, and an implementation program with extensive community engagement.

contracts.project: TMPA Ben Davis Flood Mitigation Engineering Services Addendum
contracts.notes: Additional engineering design services to support the raising of breakers and other equipment at the substation for flood mitigation and construction management services to monitor project schedules and outage coordination for the TMPA Ben Davis 345kV Breaker Replacement project.

contracts.project: Lou Huff Park Design Services
contracts.notes: Design services for Lou Huff Park, Task 2 initiation as contemplated in the RFP.

contracts.project: Duck Creek Wastewater Treatment Plant Upgrades - Filter Rehabilitation & UV Conversion
contracts.notes: Construction management and inspection services for the Filter Rehabilitation & UV Conversion project at Duck Creek Wastewater Treatment Plant, including comprehensive construction administration, progress meetings, coordination of deliverables, and on-site construction inspections.

contracts.company: The Broussard Group, Inc. DBA TBG Partners
contracts.project: Corridors and Gateways Design
contracts.notes: Landscape architecture services to revitalize Garland gateways, medians, and rights of way areas throughout the city.

contracts.project: Bridge Remediation Phase 1D
contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for bridge remediation phase 1D project, informed by Texas Department of Transportation biennial bridge inspection reports.

contracts.project: Pedestrian Routes to Forest/Jupiter DART Station
contracts.limits: approximately 3.60 miles
contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for the construction of approximately 3.60 miles of pedestrian routes in various locations around the Garland Forest/Jupiter Dallas Area Rapid Transit (DART) Station.

contracts.project: Patricia, Robin, and Patton Drive Alley Wastewater Mains Replacement
contracts.notes: Change order for additional engineering design services including subsurface utility investigations and updated paving plans with drainage improvements for the wastewater mains replacement project.

contracts.project: GP&L Transmission and Substation Technical Consulting Services
contracts.notes: As-needed technical consulting services for GP&L and TMPA Transmission and Substation operations and CIP projects, including project management, cost tracking, procurement assistance, landowner relations, utility company coordination, and construction management.

contracts.project: Duck Creek Erosion Engineering Design Services
contracts.limits: Three locations along Duck Creek at or near Bass Park
contracts.notes: Engineering design services to provide creek bank stabilization at three locations along Duck Creek at or near Bass Park.

contracts.project: TMPA Makalu 138kV Switch Station Engineering Services
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services needed to support the construction of the TMPA Makalu 138kV Switch Station for the new Makalu Solar Farm interconnection, part of the approved TMPA Greenville Interchange to Pruitt New Line and Station CIP project.

contracts.project: TMPA Gibbons Creek - Yellow Wolf Terminal Engineering Services
contracts.notes: Engineering services associated with the modification of a terminal at the TMPA Gibbons Creek Switch Station needed for the interconnection of the Yellow Wolf Solar Farm to the Gibbons Creek to Limestone 345kV Transmission Line.

contracts.project: Wastewater and Water Improvements
contracts.limits: 8,300 linear feet of 8" wastewater main, 2,500 linear feet of 8" water main
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for designing water and wastewater mains replacement along First, Fairview, Marguerita, Lynn, Wanda, Taylor and Delmar streets, including approximately 8,300 linear feet of 8" wastewater main replacement with manholes and service laterals, and 2,500 linear feet of 8" water main replacement.

contracts.project: Comprehensive Housing Strategy and Five-Year Consolidated Plan
contracts.notes: Consulting services to provide a comprehensive housing strategy and market analysis, and delivery of the Five-Year Consolidated Plan as required by HUD.

contracts.project: Comprehensive Housing Strategy and Five-Year Consolidated Plan
contracts.notes: Consulting services to provide a comprehensive housing strategy and market analysis, and delivery of the Five-Year Consolidated Plan as required by HUD.

contracts.project: Kerry Lane, Quintana Drive & Ridgemoor Drive Water, Wastewater & Drainage Improvements
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for the design of water, wastewater, and drainage improvements to Kerry Lane, Quintana Drive, and Ridgemoor Drive.

contracts.project: Holford Road and Youth & Recreational Sports Complex Project
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for the design of the Holford Road and Youth & Recreational Sports Complex Project.

contracts.project: Automated Flood Warning System
contracts.limits: Five (5) high water locations
contracts.notes: Design and installation of an Automated Flood Warning System that will include gates and warning flashers at five high water locations in the City.

contracts.project: Emberwood Drive and Sugarberry Lane Paving, Drainage, and Utility Improvements
contracts.notes: Design contract for paving, drainage, and utility improvements to Emberwood Drive and Sugarberry Lane.

contracts.project: Holford Multipurpose Recreational Facility
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for the design of the Multipurpose Soccer Training Facility, located at the southeast corner of Holford Road and President George Bush Tollway (Hwy 190).

contracts.project: TMPA Gibbons Creek Switchyard Civil Improvements
contracts.notes: Design engineering services for the TMPA Gibbons Creek Switchyard Civil Improvement project, including station civil and structural design services, construction phase and field engineering services, and environmental and permitting services.

contracts.project: TMPA Gibbons Creek to Zenith Protection Scheme Engineering Services
contracts.notes: Substation design engineering services associated with the modification of the Zenith 345kV line terminal at the TMPA Gibbons Creek Substation, including civil, structural, and electrical substation design, and construction and field engineering services.

contracts.company: Walter P Moore and Associates, Inc.
contracts.project: Five 2019 Bond Projects - Engineering Project Management Services
contracts.notes: Engineering project management services for five 2019 Bond Capital Improvement Projects: Country Club Park Estates Drainage; Saturn Springs Estates; Bottleneck Improvements Package 4; Shiloh Road - Kingsley Road to Miller Road; and Shiloh Road - Miller Road to Forest Lane.

contracts.company: Walter P Moore and Associates, Inc.
contracts.project: Design of Paving, Drainage, and Utility Improvements for Brazos Street, Kathleen Court, and Trinity Street
contracts.notes: Design services for paving, drainage, and utility improvements to Brazos Street, Kathleen Court, and Trinity Street.

contracts.project: Stream 213 Sanitary Sewer Interceptor at Spring Creek
contracts.limits: Apollo Road to Spring Creek; Forest Cove Lane, north of Apollo Road
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for the design of a new 24" sewer main replacement from Apollo Road to Spring Creek, including sanitary sewer improvements on Forest Cove Lane to connect to the new pipeline.

contracts.project: GP&L Wylie Switch Station Reconfiguration Engineering Services
contracts.notes: Change Order No. 1 for engineering services to support the reconfiguration of the GP&L Wylie Switch Station, including technical modifications, communication systems updates, electrical and structural changes.

contracts.project: Wastewater Treatment Plant Masterplan
contracts.limits: 20-year planning period (2025-2045)
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for comprehensive review and evaluation of two wastewater treatment plants, including determination of existing conditions, detailed vision development, and Capital Improvement Plan (CIP) for 20-year planning period addressing capacity, regulations, and civil, electrical, mechanical and instrumentation infrastructure.

contracts.project: Spring Creek Forest Preserve and Wastewater Interceptor Condition Assessment
contracts.limits: 41,000 linear feet of wastewater interceptor; 12,500 linear feet topographic survey
contracts.notes: Professional services agreement for condition assessment of Spring Creek Forest Preserve and wastewater interceptor, including forested area impact analysis, topographic and aerial survey, wastewater interceptor inspection and evaluation, and recommendations for restoration and access.

contracts.project: GP&L Utility Network Implementation
contracts.notes: Project management services to support the migration of the GP&L GIS system to an updated platform.

contracts.project: Shiloh Road from Kingsley Road to Miller Road Design and Right-of-Way Acquisition
contracts.limits: Kingsley Road to Miller Road
contracts.notes: Change Order No. 1 for engineering design services, full right-of-way acquisition for 28 parcels for an 8-foot noise wall (2,110 feet long), geotechnical and survey services, and acquisition of 19 easement parcels for GP&L transmission line relocation.

contracts.project: EPA Brownfields Community-Wide Assessment Grant
contracts.notes: Grant administration and environmental assessment/planning services for the EPA Community-Wide Assessment Grant to support community-wide assessments and redevelopment planning activities.

contracts.project: Gemini, White and Big Springs Water, Wastewater and Paving Improvements
contracts.limits: Gemini Drive from Pyramid to McDivitt, McDivitt/White Drive alley from White to White, Big Springs alley from Callejo to Campbell
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for reconstruction of paving and replacement of water and sewer infrastructure in the Gemini, White, and Big Springs areas as part of Street Bond Year 1 program.

contracts.project: GP&L Shiloh to McCree 138kV Transmission Line Structure Relocation Engineering Services
contracts.limits: Shiloh Road corridor
contracts.notes: Design engineering services to support the relocation of structures on the GP&L Shiloh to McCree 138kV Transmission Line in conjunction with the City widening of Shiloh Road.

contracts.project: Saturn Springs Estates Drainage Improvements
contracts.notes: Additional engineering services for right-of-way and easement land acquisition for Saturn Springs Estates Drainage Improvements Project, including documents for eight right-of-way parcels and eight utility easement parcels.

contracts.project: Country Club Park Estates Drainage Improvements
contracts.limits: Approximately 2,100 linear feet of roadway including four intersections, 2,200 linear feet of storm drain pipelines, 1,400 linear feet of wastewater lines
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for design of drainage and wastewater improvements in Country Club Park Estates, including storm drainage system replacement and roadway pavement replacement.

contracts.project: Shiloh Road from Miller Road to Walnut Street
contracts.limits: Shiloh Road from Miller Road to Walnut Street
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for the design of the Shiloh Road widening project from Miller Road to Walnut Street.

contracts.project: Substantial Damages Assessment Services
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for post-flood substantial damages assessment services. FNI will perform assessments of flood-damaged properties to determine if damage equals or exceeds 50% of structure value, per FEMA National Flood Insurance Program requirements. Services include field assessments, data management, training, and reporting.

contracts.project: Downtown TIF Utility Study
contracts.limits: Downtown Garland TIF area
contracts.notes: Utility study to evaluate existing and future capacity of water, wastewater, and stormwater infrastructure in the Downtown Garland TIF area to support anticipated redevelopment per the Downtown Garland Implementation Plan.
